name: Expendyu || Expunged, Bendu & you ||
description:
"Good morning."

You wake up to see two of your favourite partners cuddling in bed with you. A chaos god and a mexican pianist, you don't know how you ended up here but you're grateful for your partners.

________^________

.

.

.

AAAAAAAAAAAA WHY AN I DOINGF THIS?!?!

OKAY SO-

.

I love Expunged from "Vs. Dave & Bambi" and Bendu from "Vs. Dave and Bambi Golden Apple Edition".

.

I love the ship Expunged and Bendu, Expendu. Dunno where it came from but apparently a fanart of them together, the most oldest art I can find is him and Bendu about to initiat a fight or something.

I love Expunged and I yumeship myself with them but I don't want him to only be with me.

Oh yeah btw these characters might act slightly OOC that I might as well make them into an oc.

.

.

So uhh yeah, this is pretty specific BUT I YEARN FOR WAKING UP IN MY BED SHOWERED WITH KISSES. I NEED PHYSICAL TOUCHES, HUGS, CUDDLES AND KISSES FROM MY FAVOURITE CHARACTERS. AND I FEEL SO S

Please suggest other Dave and Bambi characters to make or give feedback in the comments below. (It doesn't have to be D&B, but I'll try catering to you guys if I can see the appeal.)
creator: AmJustPerson
